prompts.name: Book
prompts.text: Add a book as a meaningful prop, placed naturally in the subject's hands or environment with readable detail.

prompts.name: Sword
prompts.text: Add a sword with believable grip, polished material, and design that matches the character or setting.

prompts.name: Magic Staff
prompts.text: Add a magic staff with carved details, subtle glow, and a design that supports a fantasy theme.

prompts.name: Umbrella
prompts.text: Add an umbrella with natural fabric tension, handle detail, and believable interaction with weather or pose.

prompts.name: Lantern
prompts.text: Add a lantern giving off warm light, with glass, metal, and soft glow that affects the nearby scene.

prompts.name: Camera
prompts.text: Add a camera prop with realistic lens detail, strap placement, and a natural connection to the subject.

prompts.name: Phone
prompts.text: Add a modern phone with believable scale, screen glow, and natural hand placement.

prompts.name: Single Flower
prompts.text: Add a single flower held gently or placed nearby, with delicate petals and natural color.

prompts.name: Bouquet
prompts.text: Add a bouquet of flowers with layered stems, varied blossoms, and balanced decorative detail.

prompts.name: Notebook
prompts.text: Add a notebook or journal with paper texture, visible pages, and a thoughtful everyday feeling.

prompts.name: Headphones
prompts.text: Add headphones as a modern accessory or prop with clear fit, clean shape, and subtle technical detail.

prompts.name: Musical Instrument
prompts.text: Add a musical instrument with correct scale, believable materials, and natural interaction with the subject.

prompts.name: Potion Bottle
prompts.text: Add a potion bottle with colored liquid, glass reflections, and a small magical accent.

prompts.name: Plush Toy
prompts.text: Add a soft plush toy with cute shape, fabric texture, and cozy charm.

prompts.name: Backpack
prompts.text: Add a backpack with straps, pockets, fabric texture, and believable weight placement.
